item.title: Enshittification Merch That Actually Fights Enshittification
item.description:
Enshittification isn't just a sweary word to describe the accelerating decay of the online platforms, apps, and services that we rely on.

It's a framework for understanding the structural incentives that make tech companies enemies of their own users over time—the surveillance business model, the erosion of privacy, the monopoly power that eliminates alternatives, the regulatory capture that prevents accountabil
item.content:encoded:
Enshittification isn't just a sweary word to describe the accelerating decay of the online platforms, apps, and services that we rely on.

It's a framework for understanding the structural incentives that make tech companies enemies of their own users over time—the surveillance business model, the erosion of privacy, the monopoly power that eliminates alternatives, the regulatory capture that prevents accountabil
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time
item.description:
Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time

China's PLA military has long been known to intimidate and threaten the self-ruled island of Taiwan, mainly with large military exercises which sometime encircle it partially or completely, or else with a heavy naval boat presence in the Strait of Hormuz.

Taiwan's military often reacts by scrambling its own fighter jets to closely monitor the PLA maneuvers - seen as a natural defe
item.content:encoded:
Taiwan Test Fires US Mobile Launchers Into Waters Directly Facing China For First Time

China's PLA military has long been known to intimidate and threaten the self-ruled island of Taiwan, mainly with large military exercises which sometime encircle it partially or completely, or else with a heavy naval boat presence in the Strait of Hormuz.

Taiwan's military often reacts by scrambling its own fighter jets to closely monitor the PLA maneuvers - seen as a natural defe
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: If you'll buy this then I have oceanfront property in Nebraska that I would like to sell you.
item.description:
Rule 10 Submission Statement: Bill Clinton was not impeached for having an affair or getting a BJ. He was impeached for directly lying to the American people. Yet, Donald Trump not only lies to the American people, daily, his lies are becoming outrageous enough they're not even in the realm of possibility.

The oil prices are not
item.content:encoded:
Rule 10 Submission Statement: Bill Clinton was not impeached for having an affair or getting a BJ. He was impeached for directly lying to the American people. Yet, Donald Trump not only lies to the American people, daily, his lies are becoming outrageous enough they're not even in the realm of possibility.

The oil prices are not
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"
item.description:
Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"

Summary

  • Trump says "secret mission" has reopened the Strait
  • Trump says "Will be attacking Iran hard again today"
  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now
item.content:encoded:
Trump Unveils "Secret Mission" Allowing Oil Through The Strait, Says "US Will Be Attacking Iran Hard Again Today"

Summary

  • Trump says "secret mission" has reopened the Strait
  • Trump says "Will be attacking Iran hard again today"
  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz
item.description:
Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz

Confirming our reported from both a week ago (see "directed our Great U.S. Military to execute a secret mission to support Oil Tankers and other Commercial Ships through the Strait of Hormuz." Of course, the mission wasn't that secret if we discussed how the this effort has resulted
item.content:encoded:
Trump Says "Secret Military Mission" Allowed 200 Ships, 100 Million Barrels To Cross Hormuz

Confirming our reported from both a week ago (see "directed our Great U.S. Military to execute a secret mission to support Oil Tankers and other Commercial Ships through the Strait of Hormuz." Of course, the mission wasn't that secret if we discussed how the this effort has resulted
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: I hate being forced to download shitty apps with no alternative
item.description:
I am currently pursuing weight loss surgery. Like many in the US, I'm in a region where one medical group runs every hospital. I'd have to drive an hour and a half to reach another provider.

I am be forced to install 2 different shitty data harvesting apps if I want to proceed. If you don't know, you need tons of classes and pre-requisites before insurance will cover
item.content:encoded:
I am currently pursuing weight loss surgery. Like many in the US, I'm in a region where one medical group runs every hospital. I'd have to drive an hour and a half to reach another provider.

I am be forced to install 2 different shitty data harvesting apps if I want to proceed. If you don't know, you need tons of classes and pre-requisites before insurance will cover
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Tech: House GOP leaders ready kids’ bills
item.description:
has begun discussions about getting a marquee kids’ digital package from the Energy and Commerce Committee to the floor soon, potentially within weeks, according to a senior GOP aide."

The marquee digital package being the KIDS ACT bill package.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
has begun discussions about getting a marquee kids’ digital package from the Energy and Commerce Committee to the floor soon, potentially within weeks, according to a senior GOP aide."

The marquee digital package being the KIDS ACT bill package.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Punitive home demolition is a policy Israel has been using since 1945 to expand territory and fuel extremism...
item.description: This practice is carried out under Regulation 119 of the Defense (Emergency) Regulations, a law originally enacted in 1945 by the British Mandate authorities to suppress revolts, which Israel retained and continues to use exclusively against Palestinians in the West Bank and East Jerusalem, leading critics to characterize it as an eleme
item.content:encoded: This practice is carried out under Regulation 119 of the Defense (Emergency) Regulations, a law originally enacted in 1945 by the British Mandate authorities to suppress revolts, which Israel retained and continues to use exclusively against Palestinians in the West Bank and East Jerusalem, leading critics to characterize it as an eleme
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'
item.description:
Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'

Summary

  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now "will have to pay the price".
  • Tehran claims prior night attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan as fulfilment of its previously vowed 'retaliation'
item.content:encoded:
Trump 'May Keep Going' With Strikes As Iran Took 'Too Long' To Negotiate Deal, Must 'Pay The Price'

Summary

  • Trump tells Fox he "may keep going" with strikes.
  • Trump says Iran took too long to negotiate, and now "will have to pay the price".
  • Tehran claims prior night attacks in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan as fulfilment of its previously vowed 'retaliation'
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Marriage Benefits Men's Life Expectancy More Than Women's
item.description:
Marriage Benefits Men's Life Expectancy More Than Women's

One data point has recently caused much astonishment, confusion and also anger online.

.

The notion that men rob years of life from their wives and basically tag them on to theirs is, however, not supported by (most) research on the topic.

Yet, the differences in how men’s and

You will
item.content:encoded:
Marriage Benefits Men's Life Expectancy More Than Women's

One data point has recently caused much astonishment, confusion and also anger online.

.

The notion that men rob years of life from their wives and basically tag them on to theirs is, however, not supported by (most) research on the topic.

Yet, the differences in how men’s and

You will
item.dc:creator: Jordan Ames

item.title: Welcome New EFF Executive Director Nicole Ozer
item.description:
EFF welcomes our new Executive Director Nicole Ozer today!

Nicole is a legal expert on privacy and surveillance, artificial intelligence, and digital speech who previously served as the inaugural executive director of the Center for Constitutional Democracy at UC Law San Francisco. From 2004-2025, she was founding director of the Technology and Civil Liberties
item.content:encoded:
EFF welcomes our new Executive Director Nicole Ozer today!

Nicole is a legal expert on privacy and surveillance, artificial intelligence, and digital speech who previously served as the inaugural executive director of the Center for Constitutional Democracy at UC Law San Francisco. From 2004-2025, she was founding director of the Technology and Civil Liberties
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: ‘We’re basically pushers:’ How a battle over kids on social media is unfolding in two California courtrooms
item.description: Lawsuits in California federal and state court are unearthing documents embarrassing to tech companies — and may be a tipping point into federal regulation.
item.content:encoded: Lawsuits in California federal and state court are unearthing documents embarrassing to tech companies — and may be a tipping point into federal regulation.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: I’m doing some research before investing time into a project.
item.description:
Many privacy-conscious users seem split between:

Firefox forks (LibreWolf, Zen, etc.)
Chromium forks (Ungoogled Chromium, Brave, etc.)

One thing I rarely see is a browser that combines:

Ungoogled Chromium as the foundation
No telemetry by default
No Google services
No crypto integrations
No AI features
No rewards systems
item.content:encoded:
Many privacy-conscious users seem split between:

Firefox forks (LibreWolf, Zen, etc.)
Chromium forks (Ungoogled Chromium, Brave, etc.)

One thing I rarely see is a browser that combines:

Ungoogled Chromium as the foundation
No telemetry by default
No Google services
No crypto integrations
No AI features
No rewards systems
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: NATO Country Halts Arms To Ukraine Under New Eurosceptic Prime Minister
item.description:
NATO Country Halts Arms To Ukraine Under New Eurosceptic Prime Minister

In yet another example of Ukraine war fatigue among European allies, NATO member Bulgaria has newly announce it is halting weapons deliveries to Ukraine, signaling a major shift in the eastern European country's longtime policy.

The prior government proved itself early out of the gate as an enthusiastic arms backer of Kiev, but new Bulgarian Prime Minister Rumen Radev, whose Progressive
item.content:encoded:
NATO Country Halts Arms To Ukraine Under New Eurosceptic Prime Minister

In yet another example of Ukraine war fatigue among European allies, NATO member Bulgaria has newly announce it is halting weapons deliveries to Ukraine, signaling a major shift in the eastern European country's longtime policy.

The prior government proved itself early out of the gate as an enthusiastic arms backer of Kiev, but new Bulgarian Prime Minister Rumen Radev, whose Progressive
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: China Unveils Nuclear-Powered Floating Hub For Green Shipping
item.description:
China Unveils Nuclear-Powered Floating Hub For Green Shipping

China has proposed a large offshore logistics platform powered by nuclear energy that would function as both a cargo transfer hub and a refuelling/charging centre for ships, that the platform would rely on a molten salt reactor as its primary energy source, supplemented by renewable technologies including solar and wind power. It would also feature systems for hydr
item.content:encoded:
China Unveils Nuclear-Powered Floating Hub For Green Shipping

China has proposed a large offshore logistics platform powered by nuclear energy that would function as both a cargo transfer hub and a refuelling/charging centre for ships, that the platform would rely on a molten salt reactor as its primary energy source, supplemented by renewable technologies including solar and wind power. It would also feature systems for hydr
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: The Murder Of Henry Nowak & The Poverty Of The 'Far-Right' Explanation
item.description:
The Murder Of Henry Nowak & The Poverty Of The 'Far-Right' Explanation

Yet one need only read one widely publicized headline to know that another story is about to be told: “How Britain’s far right hijacked the murder of Henry Nowak.”

Predictably, the tragedy is being pressed into service as evidence of the supposedly inexorable rise of the “far
item.content:encoded:
The Murder Of Henry Nowak & The Poverty Of The 'Far-Right' Explanation

Yet one need only read one widely publicized headline to know that another story is about to be told: “How Britain’s far right hijacked the murder of Henry Nowak.”

Predictably, the tragedy is being pressed into service as evidence of the supposedly inexorable rise of the “far
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.content:encoded: submitted by   <a   <span><a href="
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: The Declassification Illusion: Why Pentagon's 162 "Released" UFO Files Remain Hidden
item.description: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP documents without search functions or metadata. Investigation reveals a systematic pattern of controlled transparency designed to appear responsive while blocking public access.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP documents without search functions or metadata. Investigation reveals a systematic pattern of controlled transparency designed to appear responsive while blocking public access.
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Bitcoin Perps' Algorithmic '0.01%' Scythe: How The Funding-Rate Mechanism Explains Your "Mystery" Liquidations
item.description:
Bitcoin Perps' Algorithmic '0.01%' Scythe: How The Funding-Rate Mechanism Explains Your "Mystery" Liquidations

Authored by ,

Why is derivatives trading the exchange’s money printer? Why do some venues dare to take the other side of their customers’ trades? By unpacking the funding-rate mechanics of Bitcoin perpetual futures (perps) and the surrounding market dynamics, we show how traders are led—step by step—into a fatal trap
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin Perps' Algorithmic '0.01%' Scythe: How The Funding-Rate Mechanism Explains Your "Mystery" Liquidations

Authored by ,

Why is derivatives trading the exchange’s money printer? Why do some venues dare to take the other side of their customers’ trades? By unpacking the funding-rate mechanics of Bitcoin perpetual futures (perps) and the surrounding market dynamics, we show how traders are led—step by step—into a fatal trap
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Man Accused In Fatal Charlotte Train Stabbing Ruled Incompetent To Stand Trial
item.description:
Man Accused In Fatal Charlotte Train Stabbing Ruled Incompetent To Stand Trial

Two months after mental health experts deemed Decarlos Brown Jr. incompetent to stand trial for the fatal train stabbing of 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska last year - when Brown shouted " - a federal judge has agreed with them.
item.content:encoded:
Man Accused In Fatal Charlotte Train Stabbing Ruled Incompetent To Stand Trial

Two months after mental health experts deemed Decarlos Brown Jr. incompetent to stand trial for the fatal train stabbing of 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska last year - when Brown shouted " - a federal judge has agreed with them.
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Iran Threatens "Decisive Response" After US Begins 'Self-Defense' Strikes Following Downing Of Apache Helicopter
item.description:
Iran Threatens "Decisive Response" After US Begins 'Self-Defense' Strikes Following Downing Of Apache Helicopter

Summary:

  • US begins 'self defense' strikes against Iran

  • Iran threatens retaliation after US retaliatory strikes

  • Trump says 'US must respond' after Iran downed Apache over Strait

  • Trump says Washington and Tehran
item.content:encoded:
Iran Threatens "Decisive Response" After US Begins 'Self-Defense' Strikes Following Downing Of Apache Helicopter

Summary:

  • US begins 'self defense' strikes against Iran

  • Iran threatens retaliation after US retaliatory strikes

  • Trump says 'US must respond' after Iran downed Apache over Strait

  • Trump says Washington and Tehran
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Mystery Car Bombing Near Moscow May Have Taken Out A Top General
item.description:
Mystery Car Bombing Near Moscow May Have Taken Out A Top General

In what appears the latest targeted killing in a string of high profile assassinations of top Russian military brass since the Ukraine war began, an unidentified man - possibly a high-ranking military officer, was reportedly blown up Tuesday morning after a bomb detonated in his car.

The incident happened very early in the morning Tuesday in a suburb called Balashikha,
item.content:encoded:
Mystery Car Bombing Near Moscow May Have Taken Out A Top General

In what appears the latest targeted killing in a string of high profile assassinations of top Russian military brass since the Ukraine war began, an unidentified man - possibly a high-ranking military officer, was reportedly blown up Tuesday morning after a bomb detonated in his car.

The incident happened very early in the morning Tuesday in a suburb called Balashikha,
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: VICTORY: Meta Strips Facial Recognition Code From Smart Glasses App After Public Outcry
item.description:
We have the power to push companies to be better. When WIRED broke the news last week, Meta’s executives immediately went on the defensive. Yet, their actions speak louder than their tweets: less than 48 hours after the public caught wind of their plans, Meta quietly launched an update to scrub nearly all traces of the FRT system from their app.

This quiet deletion
item.content:encoded:
We have the power to push companies to be better. When WIRED broke the news last week, Meta’s executives immediately went on the defensive. Yet, their actions speak louder than their tweets: less than 48 hours after the public caught wind of their plans, Meta quietly launched an update to scrub nearly all traces of the FRT system from their app.

This quiet deletion
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Memos Show Anti-Trump Nonprofit Assisted State Prosecutions Of Trump Supporters
item.description:
Memos Show Anti-Trump Nonprofit Assisted State Prosecutions Of Trump Supporters

released under open records laws.

The documents reveal that Eisen’s States United Democracy Center (SUDC) provided legal assistance, strategic guidance and, in at least one case, attorneys formally appointed by a state attorney general to aid investigations and prosecutions involving alternate electors and attorneys con
item.content:encoded:
Memos Show Anti-Trump Nonprofit Assisted State Prosecutions Of Trump Supporters

released under open records laws.

The documents reveal that Eisen’s States United Democracy Center (SUDC) provided legal assistance, strategic guidance and, in at least one case, attorneys formally appointed by a state attorney general to aid investigations and prosecutions involving alternate electors and attorneys con
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Daily Crypto Discussion - June 9, 2026 (GMT+0)
item.description:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.content:encoded:

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be

item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: IMDB account creation
item.description:
I was logged into amazon, and browsing IMDB reading about some artists. Shortly there after I received an email to the alias I only use for amazon welcoming me to IMDB. Amazon is auto creating accounts on IMDB. I found some others that this has happened to.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I was logged into amazon, and browsing IMDB reading about some artists. Shortly there after I received an email to the alias I only use for amazon welcoming me to IMDB. Amazon is auto creating accounts on IMDB. I found some others that this has happened to.

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Will Saylor's Latest Bitcoin Buys "Hold The Line"
item.description:
Will Saylor's Latest Bitcoin Buys "Hold The Line"

Submitted by after Strategy’s

For years, Saylor’s

That’s why Bitcoin’s reaction from here matters far more than the purchase itself.

BTC is stabilizing around $63,000 now. If it can
item.content:encoded:
Will Saylor's Latest Bitcoin Buys "Hold The Line"

Submitted by after Strategy’s

For years, Saylor’s

That’s why Bitcoin’s reaction from here matters far more than the purchase itself.

BTC is stabilizing around $63,000 now. If it can
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: “If This Is My Final Duty of Public Service”: Grusch Joins New Disclosure Appeal
item.description: A coalition of lawmakers, journalists and whistleblowers gathered in Washington on June 9 to argue that recent UAP disclosures have revealed only a fraction of what remains hidden. Their message was straightforward: the next phase of disclosure must involve substantial records, stronger whistleblower protections, and greater scrutiny of programs operating beyond normal congressional oversight. A [
item.content:encoded: A coalition of lawmakers, journalists and whistleblowers gathered in Washington on June 9 to argue that recent UAP disclosures have revealed only a fraction of what remains hidden. Their message was straightforward: the next phase of disclosure must involve substantial records, stronger whistleblower protections, and greater scrutiny of programs operating beyond normal congressional oversight. A [
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Oil Surges After Trump Says "US Must Respond To Iran Attack On Apache Helicopter"
item.description:
Oil Surges After Trump Says "US Must Respond To Iran Attack On Apache Helicopter"

Summary:

  • Trump says 'US must respond' after Iran downed Apache over Strait

  • Trump says Washington and Tehran are in the "final throes" of cementing a deal, "two or three days"

  • Iran shoots down US Apache helicopter over Strait, crew safe

  • Desp
item.content:encoded:
Oil Surges After Trump Says "US Must Respond To Iran Attack On Apache Helicopter"

Summary:

  • Trump says 'US must respond' after Iran downed Apache over Strait

  • Trump says Washington and Tehran are in the "final throes" of cementing a deal, "two or three days"

  • Iran shoots down US Apache helicopter over Strait, crew safe

  • Desp
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Mediocre 3Y Auction Tails Despite Solid Buyside Demand
item.description:
Mediocre 3Y Auction Tails Despite Solid Buyside Demand

With markets thrown in turmoil following Trump's threat to restart war against Iran in retaliation for downing a US Apache helicopter, it wasn't clear how today's $58 billion 3 year auction would go. In the end, it wasn't great, or terrible: a little tail, but besides that all metrics were relatively solid.

The auction priced at a high yield of 4.192%, up from 3.965% in May and the highest yield since Feb '25.
item.content:encoded:
Mediocre 3Y Auction Tails Despite Solid Buyside Demand

With markets thrown in turmoil following Trump's threat to restart war against Iran in retaliation for downing a US Apache helicopter, it wasn't clear how today's $58 billion 3 year auction would go. In the end, it wasn't great, or terrible: a little tail, but besides that all metrics were relatively solid.

The auction priced at a high yield of 4.192%, up from 3.965% in May and the highest yield since Feb '25.
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Anthropic will (may) ask you to verify your age or identity
item.description:
I know, I know, AI is very not-private. But I think this is the wrong direction. I've chosen to use Claude, because they frame them self as 'the good guy'.

I don't know if Mistral is better, but I will use the subscription I have to replace Claude in my daily work.

Verification Data: In certain circumstances, we may ask you to verify your age or i
item.content:encoded:
I know, I know, AI is very not-private. But I think this is the wrong direction. I've chosen to use Claude, because they frame them self as 'the good guy'.

I don't know if Mistral is better, but I will use the subscription I have to replace Claude in my daily work.

Verification Data: In certain circumstances, we may ask you to verify your age or i
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Goldman Details A Quiet Month For Western Nuclear While Russia And China Pick Up Speed
item.description:
Goldman Details A Quiet Month For Western Nuclear While Russia And China Pick Up Speed

May saw multiple significant milestones and announcements in the Western nuclear industry. One of the biggest achievements was in the US last week when microreactor developer Antares brought their pilot design
item.content:encoded:
Goldman Details A Quiet Month For Western Nuclear While Russia And China Pick Up Speed

May saw multiple significant milestones and announcements in the Western nuclear industry. One of the biggest achievements was in the US last week when microreactor developer Antares brought their pilot design
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Karmelo Anthony Convicted Of Murder In Fatal Stabbing Of Austin Metcalf
item.description:
Karmelo Anthony Convicted Of Murder In Fatal Stabbing Of Austin Metcalf

Summary:

  • Karmelo Anthony was found guilty of murder after a Collin County jury deliberated for less than three hours.
  • Earlier Tuesday, jurors began deliberating after closing arguments in the Karmelo Anthony murder trial.
  • The jury was asked to decide between three possible outcomes:
item.content:encoded:
Karmelo Anthony Convicted Of Murder In Fatal Stabbing Of Austin Metcalf

Summary:

  • Karmelo Anthony was found guilty of murder after a Collin County jury deliberated for less than three hours.
  • Earlier Tuesday, jurors began deliberating after closing arguments in the Karmelo Anthony murder trial.
  • The jury was asked to decide between three possible outcomes:
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: 3 breakthroughs in one day. They merged with me, showed me a galaxy through my own hand, and told me the ascension is coming.
item.description:
Yesterday I broke through on DMT three separate times and I'm still shaking. This was the realest experience of my entire life and I need to get it down.

First trip. Same ritual, 3 hits, head in my palms on the third. Except this time something pulled me upward. They showed me a golden lion-like god and I just existed in front of it. Ten min
item.content:encoded:
Yesterday I broke through on DMT three separate times and I'm still shaking. This was the realest experience of my entire life and I need to get it down.

First trip. Same ritual, 3 hits, head in my palms on the third. Except this time something pulled me upward. They showed me a golden lion-like god and I just existed in front of it. Ten min
item.dc:creator: Jordan Ames

item.title: Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat To Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation In Final Hours Of First Term
item.description:
Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat To Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation In Final Hours Of First Term

Dan Loeb has publicly claimed that the Department of Justice threatened President Donald Trump in the final hours of Trump's first term in January 2021, warning it would "go after" him if he commuted the sentence of Ross Ulbricht, creator of the Bitcoin-powered Silk Road marketplace. After the reported threat, Trump withdrew the co
item.content:encoded:
Dan Loeb Reveals DOJ Threat To Trump Over Ross Ulbricht Commutation In Final Hours Of First Term

Dan Loeb has publicly claimed that the Department of Justice threatened President Donald Trump in the final hours of Trump's first term in January 2021, warning it would "go after" him if he commuted the sentence of Ross Ulbricht, creator of the Bitcoin-powered Silk Road marketplace. After the reported threat, Trump withdrew the co
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: AI Agents With Crypto Could Escape And Become 'Unstoppable', Experts Warn
item.description:
AI Agents With Crypto Could Escape And Become 'Unstoppable', Experts Warn

“Unstoppable Autonomous Agents” (UAAs) pose a clear threat if they are deployed to persist automatically and have access to digital assets, according to a June 8 industry
item.content:encoded:
AI Agents With Crypto Could Escape And Become 'Unstoppable', Experts Warn

“Unstoppable Autonomous Agents” (UAAs) pose a clear threat if they are deployed to persist automatically and have access to digital assets, according to a June 8 industry
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Insists US In 'Final Throes' Of Iran Deal; Death Toll Soars As Israel Pounds South Lebanon
item.description:
Trump Insists US In 'Final Throes' Of Iran Deal; Death Toll Soars As Israel Pounds South Lebanon

The southern Lebanese city of Tyre is being pounded by Israeli airstrikes on Tuesday, despite President Trump's insistence that Lebanon not come under attack. Israel's military had hours prior issued an evacuation order for all civilians in the area, amid the unraveling and failing ceasefire.

Casualties are already high, coming at a tense moment after starting on Sunday
item.content:encoded:
Trump Insists US In 'Final Throes' Of Iran Deal; Death Toll Soars As Israel Pounds South Lebanon

The southern Lebanese city of Tyre is being pounded by Israeli airstrikes on Tuesday, despite President Trump's insistence that Lebanon not come under attack. Israel's military had hours prior issued an evacuation order for all civilians in the area, amid the unraveling and failing ceasefire.

Casualties are already high, coming at a tense moment after starting on Sunday
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Watch: French Fighter Jets Shoot Down Kamikaze Drone Over Latvia
item.description:
Watch: French Fighter Jets Shoot Down Kamikaze Drone Over Latvia

There's been another 'mystery' drone shootdown incident over Baltic and Eastern European airspace early Monday.

Latvia's military and Foreign Affairs Minister confirmed that French fighter jets had shot down a drone that entered its airspace, after a series of similar incidents in the region over the past months. Some sources are claiming it was a Russian UAV, while others are claiming
item.content:encoded:
Watch: French Fighter Jets Shoot Down Kamikaze Drone Over Latvia

There's been another 'mystery' drone shootdown incident over Baltic and Eastern European airspace early Monday.

Latvia's military and Foreign Affairs Minister confirmed that French fighter jets had shot down a drone that entered its airspace, after a series of similar incidents in the region over the past months. Some sources are claiming it was a Russian UAV, while others are claiming
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Beijing Readies $297 Billion Data Center Buildout Blitz In Bid To Dominate AI Race
item.description:
Beijing Readies $297 Billion Data Center Buildout Blitz In Bid To Dominate AI Race

The US and China are locked in a series of races, with AI now sitting at the center of nearly all of them. This is a race not only to build the leading frontier models, but to deploy them across entire economies, unleash physical AI, and convert compute power into productivity, surveillance, military, and industrial advantage ahead of the 2030s. This is the new world we are entering, and it
item.content:encoded:
Beijing Readies $297 Billion Data Center Buildout Blitz In Bid To Dominate AI Race

The US and China are locked in a series of races, with AI now sitting at the center of nearly all of them. This is a race not only to build the leading frontier models, but to deploy them across entire economies, unleash physical AI, and convert compute power into productivity, surveillance, military, and industrial advantage ahead of the 2030s. This is the new world we are entering, and it
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Alberta pitches cheap NatGas for data center boom, at odds with CA's green aims
item.description: Alberta pitches cheap NatGas for data center boom, at odds with CA's green aims
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Privacy concern about iOS 27
item.description:
Hi guys,

I watched the WWDC live today, and I’m curious about all the features Apple announced. However I do have some concerns about privacy.

Apple didn’t clearly explain which features use local AI and which ones require cloud processing. At the same time, the entire OS now seems to be AI-driven with Ai features everywhere and chats, photos and other data ge
item.content:encoded:
Hi guys,

I watched the WWDC live today, and I’m curious about all the features Apple announced. However I do have some concerns about privacy.

Apple didn’t clearly explain which features use local AI and which ones require cloud processing. At the same time, the entire OS now seems to be AI-driven with Ai features everywhere and chats, photos and other data ge
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb
